title: LLM call evidence inventory contract
goal: C3: LLM call evidence inventory contract. Produce the smallest verifiable slice requested by the final task book.
context: Generated by MetaAI from docs/roadmap/TURINGOS_FINAL_TASK_SPEC_V2.md for multi-agent pipeline stress testing. Low-reasoning WorkerAI must follow the steps exactly and avoid architecture decisions.
step_by_step_instructions: Inventory current LLM gateway surfaces by document/code anchor where possible.
Classify each as gateway, fake/test, unknown, or violation candidate.
Add a tiny regression test that the inventory names PromptCapsule, AttemptTelemetry, EvidenceTuple, and no naked LLM call.
